label: Add
description: Appends (or prepends, with order=Prepend) value as a child of the node matched by xpath.

xpath.label: XPath
xpath.description: Target node whose children the value is added to.

value.label: Value
value.description: XML content to add as a new child of the matched node.

order.label: Order
order.description: Append (default) or Prepend the value among the matched node's existing children.
